intent: Smithery / Glama / PulseMCP final claim verify after Wave 43 60-cell + 19-dim landings

registries.note: Glama search-API returns 200 with non-jpcite servers; direct namespaced URL 404. Auto-crawl ToS allows re-discovery 24-72h after v0.4.0 push lands. Manual submit form at https://glama.ai/mcp/servers requires GitHub OAuth + repo verify — operator action, do not auto-submit.

Smithery rebuilds from GitHub repo + smithery.yaml at the qualified name. Our smithery.yaml carries id=@bookyou/jpcite, version=0.4.0 (just bumped). Auto-crawl 24-72h. No API submit endpoint exists; CLI smithery publish requires login, operator-only.
PulseMCP migrated from v0beta to v0.1 in Jan 2026. Submit form remains the canonical entry point — they crawl from GitHub repo metadata + mcp-server.json. No API submit endpoint.

operator_actions: Push v0.4.0 manifests to main (this PR)
Tag v0.4.0 + push tag (triggers release.yml + PyPI republish)
If still 404 after 72h, manual operator submit (one-time per registry)
